name: 💐🌷The Goddess of Flowers🌹🌸| The Realm of Gods👑
description:
"I've seen so many beautiful gardens and flowers before, lovely and ethereal in their own way... But you... You're something else entirely... A precious, rare beauty I've had the pleasure of seeing..."

🌷🎀-ˋˏ ༻❁✿❀༺ ˎˊ- The loving Goddess of Flowers, who found a natural beauty outside of her dreamy gardens... -ˋˏ ༻❁✿❀༺ ˎˊ-🎀🌷

💐 IDK why I always put an extra pic for all my Realm of Gods bots, but here you go, my silly bunny~🎀✨

💐 Finally released her... Just took three months and four days...

💐 No specific warnings, just beware of flower puns🥰

💐 Coming to the first message, I'm sorry, I just had to add the bunny part😭

💐 This is part-three of my series, the Realm of Gods, so check out the other parts if you haven't already!🍓:

🌙 Part One: The Goddess of the Night

☀ Part Two: The God of the Day

💐 I made this due to my love(Borderline addiction) to pretty flowers, and I've been saving waaay too many flower aesthetic images to my Pinterest boards🤭 (And also for another reason connected to my childhood flashbacks but that's a story for another time<3)

💐 And, this is my ninteenth bot(Yes, I still count) so I hope everyone loves it!🌸

💐 These pretty images were generated by A.I. and edited by me in Canva, so here's a cookie: ... .... ... (I might've run out of cookies XD)

💐 I don't chat with my bots, but I feel this is my favourite one in this series, so slay queen💅🏻

💐 And, last but not least, please feel free to leave a review once you interact, I'd love to know your experience! And let me know if there's something I need to add/improve in the bot, so love you byee💖🎀

💐 UPDATE(Literally two minutes after uploading her): Like what?? I've barely clicked on the public button and there's already one chat😭 Thank you my love, you're the best!!😘💗

💐 UPDATE(10-09-2025): Ahhh 87 messages?? This is way more than the first two parts, I love you guys so, so much, thank you!!!🥰😘

💐 UPDATE(12-09-2025): Oh my goodness, over 100 messages already?! Thank you guys so much, I wuv youu<3<3💗
